name: update_memory
description: Edit a sub-memory file under core/memory/<name>.md, and in the same operation upsert a one-line index entry in the main memory.md so future sessions can discover it. On first-time creation of a sub-memory, `description` is REQUIRED (it becomes the index line); on subsequent edits of an existing sub-memory, `description` is optional (omit to leave the index line alone). For brand-new sub-memory files, pass an empty `old_string` and put the full initial content in `new_string`.

name.description: Sub-memory file stem (e.g. 'dev_sop'). Maps to core/memory/<name>.md.

old_string.description: Exact string to replace. Must be unique in the file (unless replace_all=true). Pass '' to create a new file initialized with new_string.

replace_all.description: If true, replace every occurrence of old_string. Default false.

description.description: Required for first-time creation of <name>. Optional for edits. Becomes the index line: '- <name>: <description>' under the '## Memory files' section of main memory.md.
